refactorItems.title: Fix double-DPR scaling in CanvasCellDemo
refactorItems.description: drawCell is called with x*dpr / y*dpr AND dpr, causing ctx.scale(dpr,dpr) to be applied twice. Change to logical coordinates so the hook's internal scale is the only one.

change.old: drawCell(ctx, ri, ci, x * dpr, y * dpr, dpr)
change.new: drawCell(ctx, ri, ci, x, y, dpr)

refactorItems.title: Fix useCanvasCell test environment so all 13 tests pass
refactorItems.description: @chenglou/pretext's prepareWithSegments requires document.createElement('canvas').getContext('2d') which is absent in Bun's default test runner. Add a jsdom environment directive at the top of the test file.

change.notes: Also ensure jsdom is installed: bun add -d jsdom @types/jsdom

refactorItems.title: Document rowHeights parameter in useInfiniteScroll
refactorItems.description: The rowHeights parameter was added to avoid scrollHeight DOM reads (AC07) but is absent from FR-3/US-003-AC01. Update JSDoc to clearly explain why it is required and show canonical wiring with useMeasure.
